Subscriptions, Billing, and Cancellations
1. Subscription Plans and Auto-Renewal
discareer offers paid subscription plans ("Pro Plans") on a monthly or annual basis.

By subscribing to a Pro Plan, you agree that your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing period (monthly or annually, as selected by you) at the then-current price, unless you cancel your subscription before the end of the current billing cycle.
2. Billing and Payment Processing

All payments are processed securely through our third-party payment processor, Stripe. By providing a payment method, you authorise discareer (via Stripe) to charge the subscription fees, including any applicable taxes, to your designated payment method. You represent that you are authorised to use the chosen payment method. You must keep your payment information up to date to avoid service interruptions.
3. Cancellation Policy
You may cancel your subscription at any time. To cancel, you must use the "Manage Subscription" option in your Billing Settings page, which will redirect you to the Stripe Customer Billing Portal.

- If you cancel a Monthly Plan: Your cancellation will take effect at the end of the current monthly billing period. You will retain access until the end of that month, and no further charges will be made.

- If you cancel an Annual Plan: Your cancellation stops the automatic renewal of the subscription for the following year. Your access will continue for the remainder of your current pre-paid annual term.
4. Refund Policy
All fees paid for monthly or annual subscriptions are non-refundable.

If you cancel an annual plan mid-term, you will not receive a refund for the unused months of the current year. Any refunds, pro-rated credits, or adjustments are issued solely at the Company's absolute discretion and on a case-by-case basis. If a refund is granted, your access to the Pro features will terminate immediately or at a date determined by the Company.
5. Price Changes

We reserve the right to adjust pricing for our Services or any components thereof in any manner and at any time as we may determine in our sole and absolute discretion. Any price changes will take effect following notice to you via email or the Service.
